---
name: research-brief
description: Produce a concise research brief with findings, implications, and recommendation
agent: plan
---
Use the following files as context:

- [Research summary](../../docs/01-research-summary.md)
- [Framework architecture](../../docs/02-framework-architecture.md)
- [Governance and metrics](../../docs/07-governance-metrics.md)

Create a Markdown research brief with the following sections:
- Question
- Findings
- Implications
- Recommendation
- Risks / open questions
- Suggested next action

Prefer a recommendation that is practical in a managed enterprise environment.
